text.title: API OpenAPI Spec Authoring Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable input signals to a conclusion. Every leaf references a rule from `content/01-core-rules.xml`. Routes (size of API, CI capacity, freshness needs) to full-sharded / single-file / inline-yaml-in-code. Every leaf cites a rule from `content/01-core-rules.xml`.

decision-tree.root-question: Are all prerequisites in AGENTS.md reachable and citable?

conclusion.verdict: skip; emit structured skip decision pointing to the missing prerequisite

branch.question: Does the triggering activity match an item in the 'Applies If' list (ALL must hold)?

conclusion.verdict: skip; route to the sibling methodology suggested in 'Skip If' notes

branch.question: Is ≥1 verbatim citation available per non-trivial field declared in the output contract?

conclusion.verdict: halt; collect evidence before filling the artefact

branch.question: Is a single named owner willing to own the artefact?

conclusion.verdict: skip; route to triage to find an owner before producing the artefact
apply the full methodology; emit artefact with status=ready_for_review and surface to the named reviewer

text.example: prereqs_ok=true → applies_if=true → evidence_available=true → named_owner=true → apply the full methodology; status=ready_for_review.
